serverDbErrorsEncountered.details: The current JS runner seed implementation (applySeedData) only supports seeding venues; booking module DRAFT_SPEC designs include seedData entities like user, booking, roster_slot, companion_profile.

whyHappyPathDidNotRun: The specified BOOKING module test files are SPEC_DRIVEN_DRAFT (DRAFT_SPEC) artifacts.
They contain seedData entities and step actionTypes (validation/allocation/dbVerification/etc.) that the current JS runner does not execute.
Execution therefore fails immediately at seeding with: Unsupported seed entity: user.
whatWouldBeNeededToMakeTheseRunnableWith: Extend JS runner seeding to support: user, booking, companion_profile, roster_slot, booking_companion_assignment (and any FK/enum constraints).
Add step executors for actionTypes like dbVerification / authorization / internalAuth / allocation / responseValidation (or translate these designs into executable apiRequest+dbQuery steps).
Materialize requiredPayloadFields/payloadRules into concrete step.payload values (like the existing qa/tmp/*-materialized.json journey tests do).

notes.additionalConstraintFound: PATCH /bookings/{id} is not currently registered in src/modules/booking/booking.route.ts, so MOD-BOOKING-004/005 cannot pass until the endpoint exists.
